Source   Edit  

Imports

stringresize, asyncwrapper

Types

AsyncBufferConsumer = proc (x: openArray[char]): Future[int]
Source   Edit   
AsyncFlushBuffer = object
  data*: string
  consumer*: AsyncBufferConsumer ## returns number of characters consumed
                                 ## set to nil after returning negative
  freeBefore*: int           ## position before which we can cull the buffer
  flushPos*: int             ## position before which the buffer has been flushed
Source   Edit

proc callConsumer(buffer: var AsyncFlushBuffer): owned(Future[void]) {.
    ...stackTrace: false, raises: [Exception, ValueError], tags: [RootEffect],
    forbids: [].}
for internal use, only called if buffer consumer is known not to be nil Source   Edit

proc endFlush(buffer: var AsyncFlushBuffer): owned(Future[void]) {.
    ...stackTrace: false, raises: [Exception], tags: [RootEffect], forbids: [].}
signals to consumer the end of flushing, leaves remaining buffer Source   Edit   
proc finishFlush(buffer: var AsyncFlushBuffer): owned(Future[void]) {.
    ...stackTrace: false, raises: [Exception, ValueError], tags: [RootEffect],
    forbids: [].}
fully flushes buffer and signals end of flushing to consumer if consumer still exists Source   Edit

file has to last as long as the flush Source   Edit
